name: R-15 (SS-92)
events: 1 Mar 1942 USS R-15 departed Bermuda for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
5 Mar 1942 USS R-15 arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from Bermuda.
2 Sep 1942 USS R-15 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda via patrol station about 300 nautical miles North of Bermuda.
11 Sep 1942 USS R-15 arrived at New London, Connecticut for an overhaul.
22 Nov 1942 USS R-15 departed New London, Connecticut for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
15 Dec 1942 USS R-15 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
20 Dec 1942 USS R-15 arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
23 Feb 1943 USS R-15 departed St. Thomas, Virgin Islands for Bermuda.
27 Feb 1943 USS R-15 arrived at Bermuda from St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
2 Aug 1943 USS R-15 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
7 Aug 1943 USS R-15 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
27 Dec 1943 USS R-15 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
31 Dec 1943 USS R-15 arrived at Bermuda from New London, Connecticut.
13 Dec 1944 USS R-15 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
17 Dec 1944 USS R-15 arrived at Bermuda from New London, Connecticut.
21 Feb 1945 USS R-15 arrived at Key West, Florida from Bermuda for repairs and onward routing to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
26 Feb 1945 USS R-15 departed Key West, Florida for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
1 Mar 1945 USS R-15 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from Key West, Florida.
17 Jun 1945 USS R-15 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for Key West, Florida.
20 Jun 1945 USS R-15 arrived at Key West, Florida from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
11 Aug 1945 USS R-15 departed Key West, Florida for Port Everglades, Florida.
12 Aug 1945 USS R-15 arrived at Port Everglades, Florida from Key West, Florida.
1 Sep 1945 USS R-15 departed Port Everglades, Florida for Key West, Florida.
2 Sep 1945 USS R-15 arrived at Key West, Florida for Port Everglades, Florida.
